tEn: Transformer-XL: Attentive Language Models Beyond a Fixed-Length Context
tZh: Transformer-XL：超越固定长度上下文的注意力语言模型
sEn: Transformer-XL enables learning longer-term dependency beyond fixed-length context with segment-level recurrence and novel positional encoding.
sZh: Transformer-XL通过片段级循环机制和新型位置编码，实现了超越固定长度上下文的长期依赖学习。
absEn: Transformers have a potential of learning longer-term dependency, but are limited by a fixed-length context in the setting of language modeling. We propose a novel neural architecture Transformer-XL that enables learning dependency beyond a fixed length without disrupting temporal coherence. It consists of a segment-level recurrence mechanism and a novel positional encoding scheme. Our method not only enables capturing longer-term dependency, but also resolves the context fragmentation problem. As a result, Transformer-XL learns dependency that is 80% longer than RNNs and 450% longer than vanilla Transformers, achieves better performance on both short and long sequences, and is up to 1,800+ times faster than vanilla Transformers during evaluation. Notably, we improve the state-of-the-art results of bpc/perplexity to 0.99 on enwiki8, 1.08 on text8, 18.3 on WikiText-103, 21.8 on One Billion Word, and 54.5 on Penn Treebank (without finetuning). When trained only on WikiText-103, Transformer-XL manages to generate reasonably coherent, novel text articles with thousands of tokens. Our code, pretrained models, and hyperparameters are available in both Tensorflow and PyTorch.
absZh: Transformer有学习长期依赖的潜力，但在语言建模中受限于固定长度的上下文。我们提出了一种新颖的神经网络架构Transformer-XL，它能够在不破坏时间连贯性的情况下学习超越固定长度的依赖关系。该架构包含一个片段级循环机制和一种新颖的位置编码方案。我们的方法不仅能够捕捉更长期的依赖关系，还能解决上下文碎片化问题。因此，Transformer-XL学习的依赖关系比RNN长80%，比原始Transformer长450%，在短序列和长序列上均取得了更好的性能，并且在评估时比原始Transformer快1800倍以上。值得注意的是，我们在enwiki8上实现了0.99 bpc/困惑度，在text8上为1.08，在WikiText-103上为18.3，在One Billion Word上为21.8，在Penn Treebank上为54.5（无需微调），均改进了当前最优结果。当仅在WikiText-103上训练时，Transformer-XL能够生成包含数千个标记的合理连贯、新颖的文本文章。我们的代码、预训练模型和超参数可在TensorFlow和PyTorch中获取。

contrib.en: Proposes Transformer-XL with segment-level recurrence for long-term dependency learning.
contrib.zh: 提出带有段级循环机制的Transformer-XL，用于学习长期依赖。

contrib.en: Introduces a novel relative positional encoding scheme enabling state reuse.
contrib.zh: 引入新型相对位置编码方案，支持状态复用。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art results on five language modeling benchmarks.
contrib.zh: 在五个语言建模基准上取得最优结果。

contrib.en: Resolves context fragmentation problem, improving performance on short sequences.
contrib.zh: 解决上下文碎片问题，提升短序列性能。

contrib.en: Demonstrates up to 1,800+ times faster evaluation than vanilla Transformers.
contrib.zh: 推理速度比原始Transformer快1800倍以上。

contrib.en: Generates coherent long text articles with thousands of tokens.
contrib.zh: 生成数千词元的连贯长文本文章。

limits.en: Recurrence mechanism requires additional memory for caching hidden states.
limits.zh: 循环机制需要额外内存来缓存隐藏状态。

limits.en: Training still uses fixed-length segments, limiting theoretical context length.
limits.zh: 训练仍使用固定长度段，限制理论上下文长度。

limits.en: Relative positional encoding may not generalize to extremely long sequences.
limits.zh: 相对位置编码可能无法泛化到极长序列。

limits.en: Performance on small datasets relies on regularization techniques.
limits.zh: 在小数据集上的性能依赖正则化技术。

limits.en: Evaluation speed advantage diminishes with very large memory sizes.
limits.zh: 当记忆规模极大时，推理速度优势减弱。

items.en: Transformers have a potential of learning longer-term dependency, but are limited by a fixed-length context in the setting of language modeling. We propose a novel neural architecture Transformer-XL that enables learning dependency beyond a fixed length without disrupting temporal coherence. It consists of a segment-level recurrence mechanism and a novel positional encoding scheme. Our method not only enables capturing longer-term dependency, but also resolves the context fragmentation problem. As a result, Transformer-XL learns dependency that is 80% longer than RNNs and 450% longer than vanilla Transformers, achieves better performance on both short and long sequences, and is up to 1,800+ times faster than vanilla Transformers during evaluation. Notably, we improve the state-of-the-art results of bpc/perplexity to 0.99 on enwiki8, 1.08 on text8, 18.3 on WikiText-103, 21.8 on One Billion Word, and 54.5 on Penn Treebank (without finetuning). When trained only on WikiText-103, Transformer-XL manages to generate reasonably coherent, novel text articles with thousands of tokens. Our code, pretrained models, and hyperparameters are available in both Tensorflow and PyTorch111https://github.com/kimiyoung/transformer-xl.
items.zh: Transformer 具有学习长期依赖的潜力，但在语言建模中受限于固定长度的上下文。我们提出了一种新颖的神经网络架构 Transformer-XL，它能够在不破坏时间连贯性的情况下学习超出固定长度的依赖。该架构包含一个段级循环机制和一种新颖的位置编码方案。我们的方法不仅能够捕获更长期的依赖，还能解决上下文碎片化问题。因此，Transformer-XL 学习的依赖比 RNN 长 80%，比原始 Transformer 长 450%，在短序列和长序列上均取得更优性能，并且在评估时比原始 Transformer 快 1800 倍以上。值得注意的是，我们在 enwiki8 上将 bpc/困惑度提升至 0.99，在 text8 上为 1.08，在 WikiText-103 上为 18.3，在 One Billion Word 上为 21.8，在 Penn Treebank 上为 54.5（无需微调）。仅使用 WikiText-103 训练时，Transformer-XL 能够生成包含数千个 token 的合理连贯且新颖的文本文章。我们的代码、预训练模型和超参数可在 TensorFlow 和 PyTorch 中获取。

items.en: Language modeling is among the important problems that require modeling long-term dependency, with successful applications such as unsupervised pretraining (Dai and Le, 2015; Peters et al., 2018; Radford et al., 2018; Devlin et al., 2018). However, it has been a challenge to equip neural networks with the capability to model long-term dependency in sequential data. Recurrent neural networks (RNNs), in particular Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) networks (Hochreiter and Schmidhuber, 1997), have been a standard solution to language modeling and obtained strong results on multiple benchmarks. Despite the wide adaption, RNNs are difficult to optimize due to gradient vanishing and explosion (Hochreiter et al., 2001), and the introduction of gating in LSTMs and the gradient clipping technique (Graves, 2013) might not be sufficient to fully address this issue. Empirically, previous work has found that LSTM language models use 200 context words on average (Khandelwal et al., 2018), indicating room for further improvement.
items.zh: 语言建模是需要建模长期依赖的重要问题之一，其成功应用包括无监督预训练。然而，为神经网络配备建模序列数据中长期依赖的能力一直是一个挑战。循环神经网络，特别是长短期记忆网络，一直是语言建模的标准解决方案，并在多个基准上取得了强劲结果。尽管被广泛采用，RNN 由于梯度消失和爆炸而难以优化，而 LSTM 中的门控机制和梯度裁剪技术可能不足以完全解决这一问题。经验上，先前工作发现 LSTM 语言模型平均使用 200 个上下文词，表明仍有改进空间。

items.en: On the other hand, the direct connections between long-distance word pairs baked in attention mechanisms might ease optimization and enable the learning of long-term dependency (Bahdanau et al., 2014; Vaswani et al., 2017). Recently, Al-Rfou et al. (2018) designed a set of auxiliary losses to train deep Transformer networks for character-level language modeling, which outperform LSTMs by a large margin. Despite the success, the LM training in Al-Rfou et al. (2018) is performed on separated fixed-length segments of a few hundred characters, without any information flow across segments. As a consequence of the fixed context length, the model cannot capture any longer-term dependency beyond the predefined context length. In addition, the fixed-length segments are created by selecting a consecutive chunk of symbols without respecting the sentence or any other semantic boundary. Hence, the model lacks necessary contextual information needed to well predict the first few symbols, leading to inefficient optimization and inferior performance. We refer to this problem as context fragmentation.
items.zh: 另一方面，注意力机制中内置的长距离词对直接连接可能简化优化并支持学习长期依赖。最近，Al-Rfou 等人设计了一组辅助损失来训练深度 Transformer 网络进行字符级语言建模，其性能大幅优于 LSTM。尽管取得了成功，Al-Rfou 等人的 LM 训练是在分离的固定长度段（几百个字符）上进行的，段之间没有信息流动。由于固定上下文长度，模型无法捕获超出预定义上下文长度的任何长期依赖。此外，固定长度段是通过选择连续符号块创建的，而不考虑句子或任何其他语义边界。因此，模型缺乏预测前几个符号所需的必要上下文信息，导致优化效率低下和性能较差。我们将此问题称为上下文碎片化。

items.en: To address the aforementioned limitations of fixed-length contexts, we propose a new architecture called Transformer-XL (meaning extra long). We introduce the notion of recurrence into our deep self-attention network. In particular, instead of computing the hidden states from scratch for each new segment, we reuse the hidden states obtained in previous segments. The reused hidden states serve as memory for the current segment, which builds up a recurrent connection between the segments. As a result, modeling very long-term dependency becomes possible because information can be propagated through the recurrent connections. Meanwhile, passing information from the previous segment can also resolve the problem of context fragmentation. More importantly, we show the necessity of using relative positional encodings rather than absolute ones, in order to enable state reuse without causing temporal confusion. Hence, as an additional technical contribution, we introduce a simple but more effective relative positional encoding formulation that generalizes to attention lengths longer than the one observed during training.
items.zh: 为了解决固定长度上下文的上述局限性，我们提出了一种名为 Transformer-XL（意为超长）的新架构。我们将循环概念引入深度自注意力网络。具体来说，我们不是为每个新段从头计算隐藏状态，而是重用先前段中获得的隐藏状态。重用的隐藏状态作为当前段的记忆，从而在段之间建立循环连接。因此，建模非常长期的依赖成为可能，因为信息可以通过循环连接传播。同时，从先前段传递信息也可以解决上下文碎片化问题。更重要的是，我们展示了使用相对位置编码而非绝对位置编码的必要性，以便在不引起时间混淆的情况下实现状态重用。因此，作为额外的技术贡献，我们引入了一种简单但更有效的相对位置编码公式，该公式可泛化到比训练时观察到的更长的注意力长度。

items.en: Transformer-XL obtained strong results on five datasets, varying from word-level to character-level language modeling. Transformer-XL is also able to generate relatively coherent long text articles with thousands of tokens (see Appendix E), trained on only 100M tokens.
items.zh: Transformer-XL 在五个数据集上取得了强劲结果，涵盖词级和字符级语言建模。Transformer-XL 还能够生成相对连贯的、包含数千个 token 的长文本文章，仅使用 100M 个 token 进行训练。

items.en: Our main technical contributions include introducing the notion of recurrence in a purely self-attentive model and deriving a novel positional encoding scheme. These two techniques form a complete set of solutions, as any one of them alone does not address the issue of fixed-length contexts. Transformer-XL is the first self-attention model that achieves substantially better results than RNNs on both character-level and word-level language modeling.
items.zh: 我们的主要技术贡献包括在纯自注意力模型中引入循环概念，并推导出一种新颖的位置编码方案。这两种技术形成了一套完整的解决方案，因为单独任何一种都无法解决固定长度上下文的问题。Transformer-XL 是第一个在字符级和词级语言建模上均显著优于 RNN 的自注意力模型。

items.en: In the last few years, the field of language modeling has witnessed many significant advances, including but not limited to devising novel architectures to better encode the context (Bengio et al., 2003; Mikolov et al., 2010; Merity et al., 2016; Al-Rfou et al., 2018), improving regularization and optimization algorithms Gal and Ghahramani (2016) , speeding up the Softmax computation (Grave et al., 2016a) , and enriching the output distribution family (Yang et al., 2017).
items.zh: 在过去几年中，语言建模领域见证了许多重大进展，包括但不限于设计新颖架构以更好地编码上下文、改进正则化和优化算法、加速 Softmax 计算以及丰富输出分布族。

items.en: To capture the long-range context in language modeling, a line of work directly feeds a representation of the wider context into the network as an additional input. Existing works range from ones where context representations are manually defined (Mikolov and Zweig, 2012; Ji et al., 2015; Wang and Cho, 2015) to others that rely on document-level topics learned from data (Dieng et al., 2016; Wang et al., 2017).
items.zh: 为了捕获语言建模中的长距离上下文，一系列工作直接将更广泛上下文的表示作为额外输入馈入网络。现有工作从手动定义上下文表示到依赖从数据中学习的文档级主题。

items.en: More broadly, in generic sequence modeling, how to capture long-term dependency has been a long-standing research problem. From this perspective, since the ubiquitous adaption of LSTM, many efforts have been spent on relieving the vanishing gradient problem, including better initialization (Le et al., 2015), additional loss signal (Trinh et al., 2018), augmented memory structure (Ke et al., 2018) and others that modify the internal architecture of RNNs to ease the optimization Wu et al. (2016); Li et al. (2018). Different from them, our work is based on the Transformer architecture and shows that language modeling as a real-world task benefits from the ability to learn longer-term dependency.
items.zh: 更广泛地说，在通用序列建模中，如何捕获长期依赖一直是一个长期的研究问题。从这个角度来看，自从 LSTM 被广泛采用以来，许多努力都致力于缓解梯度消失问题，包括更好的初始化、额外的损失信号、增强的记忆结构以及其他修改 RNN 内部架构以简化优化的方法。与它们不同，我们的工作基于 Transformer 架构，并表明语言建模作为实际任务受益于学习长期依赖的能力。

items.en: Given a corpus of tokens 𝐱=(x1,…,xT)𝐱subscript𝑥1…subscript𝑥𝑇{\mathbf{x}}=(x_{1},\dots,x_{T}), the task of language modeling is to estimate the joint probability P​(𝐱)𝑃𝐱P({\mathbf{x}}), which is often auto-regressively factorized as P​(𝐱)=∏tP​(xt∣𝐱<t)𝑃𝐱subscriptproduct𝑡𝑃conditionalsubscript𝑥𝑡subscript𝐱absent𝑡P({\mathbf{x}})=\prod_{t}P(x_{t}\mid{\mathbf{x}}_{<t}). With the factorization, the problem reduces to estimating each conditional factor. In this work, we stick to the standard neural approach to modeling the conditional probability. Specifically, a trainable neural network is used to encode the context 𝐱<tsubscript𝐱absent𝑡{\mathbf{x}}_{<t} into a fixed size hidden state, which is multiplied with the word embeddings to obtain the logits. The logits are then fed into the Softmax function, yielding a categorical probability distribution over the next token.
items.zh: 给定 token 语料库，语言建模的任务是估计联合概率，该概率通常自回归地分解为。通过这种分解，问题简化为估计每个条件因子。在这项工作中，我们坚持使用标准神经方法来建模条件概率。具体来说，使用可训练的神经网络将上下文编码为固定大小的隐藏状态，该状态与词嵌入相乘得到 logits。然后，logits 被输入 Softmax 函数，生成下一个 token 上的分类概率分布。

items.en: In order to apply Transformer or self-attention to language modeling, the central problem is how to train a Transformer to effectively encode an arbitrarily long context into a fixed size representation. Given infinite memory and computation, a simple solution would be to process the entire context sequence using an unconditional Transformer decoder, similar to a feed-forward neural network. However, this is usually infeasible with the limited resource in practice.
items.zh: 为了将 Transformer 或自注意力应用于语言建模，核心问题是如何训练 Transformer 以有效将任意长的上下文编码为固定大小的表示。给定无限的内存和计算，一个简单的解决方案是使用无条件 Transformer 解码器处理整个上下文序列，类似于前馈神经网络。然而，在实践中，由于资源有限，这通常是不可行的。

items.en: One feasible but crude approximation is to split the entire corpus into shorter segments of manageable sizes, and only train the model within each segment, ignoring all contextual information from previous segments. This is the idea adopted by Al-Rfou et al. (2018). We call it the vanilla model and visualize it in Fig. 1(a). Under this training paradigm, information never flows across segments in either the forward or backward pass. There are two critical limitations of using a fixed-length context. First, the largest possible dependency length is upper bounded by the segment length, which is a few hundred on character-level language modeling (Al-Rfou et al., 2018). Therefore, although the self-attention mechanism is less affected by the vanishing gradient problem compared to RNNs, the vanilla model is not able to fully exploit this optimization advantage. Second, though it is possible to use padding to respect the sentence or other semantic boundaries, in practice it has been standard practice to simply chunk long text into fixed-length segments due to improved efficiency (Peters et al., 2018; Devlin et al., 2018; Al-Rfou et al., 2018). However, simply chunking a sequence into fixed-length segments will lead to the context fragmentation problem as discussed in Section 1.
items.zh: 一种可行但粗略的近似是将整个语料库分割成更短的、大小可管理的段，并且仅在每个段内训练模型，忽略来自先前段的所有上下文信息。这是 Al-Rfou 等人采用的想法。我们称之为 vanilla 模型，并在图 1(a) 中进行了可视化。在这种训练范式下，信息在前向或反向传播中都不会跨段流动。使用固定长度上下文有两个关键限制。首先，最大可能的依赖长度受限于段长度，在字符级语言建模中为几百个字符。因此，尽管自注意力机制受梯度消失问题的影响比 RNN 小，但 vanilla 模型无法充分利用这一优化优势。其次，虽然可以使用填充来尊重句子或其他语义边界，但实践中由于效率提升，通常简单地将长文本分块为固定长度段。然而，简单地将序列分块为固定长度段会导致第 1 节讨论的上下文碎片化问题。

items.en: During evaluation, at each step, the vanilla model also consumes a segment of the same length as in training, but only makes one prediction at the last position. Then, at the next step, the segment is shifted to the right by only one position, and the new segment has to be processed all from scratch. As shown in Fig. 1(b), this procedure ensures that each prediction utilizes the longest possible context exposed during training, and also relieves context fragmentation issue encountered in training. However, this evaluation procedure is extremely expensive. We will show that our proposed architecture is able to substantially improve the evaluation speed.
items.zh: 在评估期间，vanilla 模型在每一步也消耗与训练时相同长度的段，但仅在最后一个位置进行一次预测。然后，在下一步，段向右移动一个位置，并且必须从头处理新段。如图 1(b) 所示，此过程确保每个预测利用训练期间暴露的最长可能上下文，并缓解训练中遇到的上下文碎片化问题。然而，这种评估过程极其昂贵。我们将展示我们提出的架构能够显著提高评估速度。

full.secZh: 3.2 基于状态复用的段级循环

items.en: To address the limitations of using a fixed-length context, we propose to introduce a recurrence mechanism to the Transformer architecture. During training, the hidden state sequence computed for the previous segment is fixed and cached to be reused as an extended context when the model processes the next new segment, as shown in Fig. 2(a). Although the gradient still remains within a segment, this additional input allows the network to exploit information in the history, leading to an ability of modeling longer-term dependency and avoiding context fragmentation. Formally, let the two consecutive segments of length L𝐿L be 𝐬τ=[xτ,1,⋯,xτ,L]subscript𝐬𝜏subscript𝑥𝜏1⋯subscript𝑥𝜏𝐿{\mathbf{s}}_{\tau}=\left[x_{\tau,1},\cdots,x_{\tau,L}\right] and 𝐬τ+1=[xτ+1,1,⋯,xτ+1,L]subscript𝐬𝜏1subscript𝑥𝜏11⋯subscript𝑥𝜏1𝐿{\mathbf{s}}_{\tau+1}=\left[x_{\tau+1,1},\cdots,x_{\tau+1,L}\right] respectively. Denoting the n𝑛n-th layer hidden state sequence produced for the τ𝜏\tau-th segment 𝐬τsubscript𝐬𝜏{\mathbf{s}}_{\tau} by 𝐡τn∈ℝL×dsuperscriptsubscript𝐡𝜏𝑛superscriptℝ𝐿𝑑{\mathbf{h}}_{\tau}^{n}\in\mathbb{R}^{L\times d}, where d𝑑d is the hidden dimension. Then, the n𝑛n-th layer hidden state for segment 𝐬τ+1subscript𝐬𝜏1{\mathbf{s}}_{\tau+1} is produced (schematically) as follows,
items.zh: 为了解决使用固定长度上下文的局限性，我们提出将循环机制引入 Transformer 架构。在训练期间，为前一个段计算的隐藏状态序列被固定并缓存，以便在模型处理下一个新段时作为扩展上下文重用，如图 2(a) 所示。尽管梯度仍保留在一个段内，但此额外输入允许网络利用历史信息，从而获得建模长期依赖和避免上下文碎片化的能力。形式上，令两个长度为 L 的连续段分别为 和。将第 n 层为第 τ 个段生成的隐藏状态序列记为，其中 d 是隐藏维度。那么，为段生成的第 n 层隐藏状态（示意性地）如下：

items.en: where the function SG​(⋅)SG⋅\text{SG}(\cdot) stands for stop-gradient, the notation [𝐡u∘𝐡v]delimited-[]subscript𝐡𝑢subscript𝐡𝑣[{\mathbf{h}}_{u}\circ{\mathbf{h}}_{v}] indicates the concatenation of two hidden sequences along the length dimension, and 𝐖⋅subscript𝐖⋅\mathbf{W}_{\cdot} denotes model parameters. Compared to the standard Transformer, the critical difference lies in that the key 𝐤τ+1nsuperscriptsubscript𝐤𝜏1𝑛{\mathbf{k}}_{\tau+1}^{n} and value 𝐯τ+1nsuperscriptsubscript𝐯𝜏1𝑛{\mathbf{v}}_{\tau+1}^{n} are conditioned on the extended context 𝐡~τ+1n−1superscriptsubscript~𝐡𝜏1𝑛1\widetilde{{\mathbf{h}}}_{\tau+1}^{n-1} and hence 𝐡τn−1superscriptsubscript𝐡𝜏𝑛1{\mathbf{h}}_{\tau}^{n-1} cached from the previous segment. We emphasize this particular design by the green paths in Fig. 2(a).
items.zh: 其中函数 SG(·) 表示停止梯度，符号 [h_u ∘ h_v] 表示沿长度维度拼接两个隐藏序列，W· 表示模型参数。与标准 Transformer 相比，关键区别在于键和值依赖于扩展上下文，因此依赖于从先前段缓存的。我们通过图 2(a) 中的绿色路径强调这一特定设计。

items.en: With this recurrence mechanism applied to every two consecutive segments of a corpus, it essentially creates a segment-level recurrence in the hidden states. As a result, the effective context being utilized can go way beyond just two segments. However, notice that the recurrent dependency between 𝐡τ+1nsuperscriptsubscript𝐡𝜏1𝑛{\mathbf{h}}_{\tau+1}^{n} and 𝐡τn−1superscriptsubscript𝐡𝜏𝑛1{\mathbf{h}}_{\tau}^{n-1} shifts one layer downwards per-segment, which differs from the same-layer recurrence in conventional RNN-LMs. Consequently, the largest possible dependency length grows linearly w.r.t. the number of layers as well as the segment length, i.e., O​(N×L)𝑂𝑁𝐿O(N\times L), as visualized by the shaded area in Fig. 2(b). This is analogous to truncated BPTT (Mikolov et al., 2010), a technique developed for training RNN-LMs. However, different from truncated BPTT, our method caches a sequence of hidden states instead of the last one, and should be applied together with the relative positional encoding technique described in Section 3.3.
items.zh: 通过将这种循环机制应用于语料库的每两个连续段，它本质上在隐藏状态中创建了段级循环。因此，有效利用的上下文可以远远超过两个段。然而，请注意，和之间的循环依赖每段向下移动一层，这与传统 RNN-LM 中的同层循环不同。因此，最大可能的依赖长度随层数和段长度线性增长，即 O(N × L)，如图 2(b) 中的阴影区域所示。这类似于为训练 RNN-LM 开发的截断 BPTT。然而，与截断 BPTT 不同，我们的方法缓存隐藏状态序列而不是最后一个状态，并且应与第 3.3 节描述的相对位置编码技术一起应用。

items.en: Besides achieving extra long context and resolving fragmentation, another benefit that comes with the recurrence scheme is significantly faster evaluation. Specifically, during evaluation, the representations from the previous segments can be reused instead of being computed from scratch as in the case of the vanilla model. In our experiments on enwiki8, Transformer-XL is up to 1,800+ times faster than the vanilla model during evaluation (see Section 4).
items.zh: 除了实现超长上下文和解决碎片化问题外，循环方案带来的另一个好处是显著更快的评估。具体来说，在评估期间，来自先前段的表示可以重用，而不是像 vanilla 模型那样从头计算。我们在 enwiki8 上的实验表明，Transformer-XL 在评估时比 vanilla 模型快 1800 倍以上。

items.en: Finally, notice that the recurrence scheme does not need to be restricted to only the previous segment. In theory, we can cache as many previous segments as the GPU memory allows, and reuse all of them as the extra context when processing the current segment. Thus, we can cache a predefined length-M𝑀M old hidden states spanning (possibly) multiple segments, and refer to them as the memory 𝐦τn∈ℝM×dsuperscriptsubscript𝐦𝜏𝑛superscriptℝ𝑀𝑑{\mathbf{m}}_{\tau}^{n}\in\mathbb{R}^{M\times d}, due to a clear connection to the memory augmented neural networks (Graves et al., 2014; Weston et al., 2014). In our experiments, we set M𝑀M equal to the segment length during training, and increase it by multiple times during evaluation.
items.zh: 最后，请注意循环方案不必仅限于前一个段。理论上，我们可以缓存 GPU 内存允许的尽可能多的先前段，并在处理当前段时将它们全部重用为额外上下文。因此，我们可以缓存跨越（可能）多个段的预定义长度 M 的旧隐藏状态，并将其称为记忆，因为与记忆增强神经网络有明确的联系。在我们的实验中，我们在训练期间将 M 设置为等于段长度，并在评估期间将其增加多倍。

items.en: While we found the idea presented in the previous subsection very appealing, there is a crucial technical challenge we haven’t solved in order to reuse the hidden states. That is, how can we keep the positional information coherent when we reuse the states? Recall that, in the standard Transformer, the information of sequence order is provided by a set of positional encodings, denoted as 𝐔∈ℝLmax×d𝐔superscriptℝsubscript𝐿max𝑑{\mathbf{U}}\in\mathbb{R}^{L_{\text{max}}\times d}, where the i𝑖i-th row 𝐔isubscript𝐔𝑖{\mathbf{U}}_{i} corresponds to the i𝑖i-th absolute position within a segment and Lmaxsubscript𝐿maxL_{\text{max}} prescribes the maximum possible length to be modeled. Then, the actual input to the Transformer is the element-wise addition of the word embeddings and the positional encodings. If we simply adapt this positional encoding to our recurrence mechanism, the hidden state sequence would be computed schematically by
items.zh: 尽管我们发现上一小节提出的想法非常吸引人，但为了重用隐藏状态，我们尚未解决一个关键的技术挑战。即，当我们重用状态时，如何保持位置信息的一致性？回想一下，在标准Transformer中，序列顺序的信息由一组位置编码提供，记为𝐔∈ℝ^{L_max×d}，其中第i行𝐔_i对应片段内的第i个绝对位置，L_max规定了可建模的最大长度。那么，Transformer的实际输入是词嵌入和位置编码的逐元素相加。如果我们简单地将这种位置编码适应到我们的循环机制中，隐藏状态序列将按以下方式计算：

items.en: where 𝐄𝐬τ∈ℝL×dsubscript𝐄subscript𝐬𝜏superscriptℝ𝐿𝑑{\mathbf{E}}_{{\mathbf{s}}_{\tau}}\in\mathbb{R}^{L\times d} is the word embedding sequence of 𝐬τsubscript𝐬𝜏{\mathbf{s}}_{\tau}, and f𝑓f represents a transformation function. Notice that, both 𝐄𝐬τsubscript𝐄subscript𝐬𝜏{\mathbf{E}}_{{\mathbf{s}}_{\tau}} and 𝐄𝐬τ+1subscript𝐄subscript𝐬𝜏1{\mathbf{E}}_{{\mathbf{s}}_{\tau+1}} are associated with the same positional encoding 𝐔1:Lsubscript𝐔:1𝐿{\mathbf{U}}_{1:L}. As a result, the model has no information to distinguish the positional difference between xτ,jsubscript𝑥𝜏𝑗x_{\tau,j} and xτ+1,jsubscript𝑥𝜏1𝑗x_{\tau+1,j} for any j=1,…,L𝑗1…𝐿j=1,\dots,L, resulting in a sheer performance loss.
items.zh: 其中𝐄_{𝐬_τ}∈ℝ^{L×d}是𝐬_τ的词嵌入序列，f表示变换函数。注意，𝐄_{𝐬_τ}和𝐄_{𝐬_{τ+1}}都与相同的位置编码𝐔_{1:L}相关联。因此，模型无法区分x_{τ,j}和x_{τ+1,j}（对于任意j=1,…,L）之间的位置差异，导致性能显著下降。

items.en: In order to avoid this failure mode, the fundamental idea is to only encode the relative positional information in the hidden states. Conceptually, the positional encoding gives the model a temporal clue or “bias” about how information should be gathered, i.e., where to attend. For the same purpose, instead of incorporating bias statically into the initial embedding, one can inject the same information into the attention score of each layer. More importantly, it is more intuitive and generalizable to define the temporal bias in a relative manner. For instance, when a query vector qτ,isubscript𝑞𝜏𝑖q_{\tau,i} attends on the key vectors 𝐤τ,≤isubscript𝐤𝜏absent𝑖{\mathbf{k}}_{\tau,\leq i}, it does not need to know the absolute position of each key vector to identify the temporal order of the segment. Instead, it suffices to know the relative distance between each key vector kτ,jsubscript𝑘𝜏𝑗k_{\tau,j} and itself qτ,isubscript𝑞𝜏𝑖q_{\tau,i}, i.e. i−j𝑖𝑗i-j. Practically, one can create a set of relative positional encodings 𝐑∈ℝLmax×d𝐑superscriptℝsubscript𝐿max𝑑{\mathbf{R}}\in\mathbb{R}^{L_{\text{max}}\times d}, where the i𝑖i-th row 𝐑isubscript𝐑𝑖{\mathbf{R}}_{i} indicates a relative distance of i𝑖i between two positions. By injecting the relative distance dynamically into the attention score, the query vector can easily distinguish the representations of xτ,jsubscript𝑥𝜏𝑗x_{\tau,j} and xτ+1,jsubscript𝑥𝜏1𝑗x_{\tau+1,j} from their different distances, making the state reuse mechanism feasible. Meanwhile, we won’t lose any temporal information, as the absolute position can be recovered recursively from relative distances.
items.zh: 为了避免这种失败模式，基本思想是仅在隐藏状态中编码相对位置信息。从概念上讲，位置编码为模型提供了关于信息如何收集的时间线索或“偏置”，即关注哪里。出于同样的目的，我们可以将相同的信息注入到每一层的注意力分数中，而不是静态地将偏置融入初始嵌入中。更重要的是，以相对方式定义时间偏置更直观且更具泛化性。例如，当查询向量q_{τ,i}关注键向量𝐤_{τ,≤i}时，它不需要知道每个键向量的绝对位置来识别片段的时间顺序。相反，只需知道每个键向量k_{τ,j}与自身q_{τ,i}之间的相对距离，即i−j。实际上，我们可以创建一组相对位置编码𝐑∈ℝ^{L_max×d}，其中第i行𝐑_i表示两个位置之间的相对距离i。通过将相对距离动态注入注意力分数，查询向量可以轻松区分x_{τ,j}和x_{τ+1,j}的表示，因为它们具有不同的距离，从而使状态重用机制可行。同时，我们不会丢失任何时间信息，因为绝对位置可以从相对距离递归恢复。

items.en: Previously, the idea of relative positional encodings has been explored in the context of machine translation (Shaw et al., 2018) and music generation (Huang et al., 2018). Here, we offer a different derivation, arriving at a new form of relative positional encodings, which not only has a one-to-one correspondence to its absolute counterpart but also enjoys much better generalization empirically (see Section 4). Firstly, in the standard Transformer (Vaswani et al., 2017), the attention score between query qisubscript𝑞𝑖q_{i} and key vector kjsubscript𝑘𝑗k_{j} within the same segment can be decomposed as
items.zh: 此前，相对位置编码的思想已在机器翻译（Shaw等人，2018）和音乐生成（Huang等人，2018）的背景下被探索。在这里，我们提供了一种不同的推导，得到了一种新形式的相对位置编码，它不仅与其绝对对应物一一对应，而且在经验上具有更好的泛化性（见第4节）。首先，在标准Transformer（Vaswani等人，2017）中，同一片段内查询q_i和键向量k_j之间的注意力分数可以分解为：

items.en: Following the idea of only relying on relative positional information, we propose to re-parameterize the four terms as follows
items.zh: 遵循仅依赖相对位置信息的想法，我们建议将四个项重新参数化如下：

items.en: The first change we make is to replace all appearances of the absolute positional embedding 𝐔jsubscript𝐔𝑗{\mathbf{U}}_{j} for computing key vectors in term (b)𝑏(b) and (d)𝑑(d) with its relative counterpart 𝐑i−jsubscript𝐑𝑖𝑗{\color[rgb]{0,1,1}{\mathbf{R}}_{i-j}}. This essentially reflects the prior that only the relative distance matters for where to attend. Note that 𝐑𝐑{\color[rgb]{0,1,1}{\mathbf{R}}} is a sinusoid encoding matrix (Vaswani et al., 2017) without learnable parameters.
items.zh: 我们做的第一个更改是将用于计算键向量的项(b)和(d)中所有出现的绝对位置嵌入𝐔_j替换为其相对对应物𝐑_{i-j}。这本质上反映了先验知识：只有相对距离对于关注位置是重要的。注意，𝐑是一个正弦编码矩阵（Vaswani等人，2017），没有可学习参数。

items.en: Secondly, we introduce a trainable parameter u∈ℝd𝑢superscriptℝ𝑑{\color[rgb]{1,0,0}u}\in\mathbb{R}^{d} to replace the query 𝐔i⊤​𝐖q⊤superscriptsubscript𝐔𝑖topsuperscriptsubscript𝐖𝑞top{\mathbf{U}}_{i}^{\top}{\mathbf{W}}_{q}^{\top} in term (c)𝑐(c). In this case, since the query vector is the same for all query positions, it suggests that the attentive bias towards different words should remain the same regardless of the query position. With a similar reasoning, a trainable parameter v∈ℝd𝑣superscriptℝ𝑑{\color[rgb]{1,0,0}v}\in\mathbb{R}^{d} is added to substitute 𝐔i⊤​𝐖q⊤superscriptsubscript𝐔𝑖topsuperscriptsubscript𝐖𝑞top{\mathbf{U}}_{i}^{\top}{\mathbf{W}}_{q}^{\top} in term (d)𝑑(d).
items.zh: 其次，我们引入一个可训练参数u∈ℝ^d来替换项(c)中的查询𝐔_i^⊤𝐖_q^⊤。在这种情况下，由于查询向量对所有查询位置相同，这表明对不同单词的注意力偏置应保持相同，无论查询位置如何。类似地，添加一个可训练参数v∈ℝ^d来替换项(d)中的𝐔_i^⊤𝐖_q^⊤。

items.en: Finally, we deliberately separate the two weight matrices 𝐖k,Esubscript𝐖𝑘𝐸{\mathbf{W}}_{k,E} and 𝐖k,Rsubscript𝐖𝑘𝑅{\mathbf{W}}_{k,R} for producing the content-based key vectors and location-based key vectors respectively.
items.zh: 最后，我们有意分离两个权重矩阵𝐖_{k,E}和𝐖_{k,R}，分别用于生成基于内容的键向量和基于位置的键向量。

items.en: Under the new parameterization, each term has an intuitive meaning: term (a)𝑎(a) represents content-based addressing, term (b)𝑏(b) captures a content-dependent positional bias, term (c)𝑐(c) governs a global content bias, and (d)𝑑(d) encodes a global positional bias.
items.zh: 在新的参数化下，每个项都有直观的含义：项(a)表示基于内容的寻址，项(b)捕获内容相关的位置偏置，项(c)控制全局内容偏置，项(d)编码全局位置偏置。

items.en: In comparison, the formulation in Shaw et al. (2018) only has terms (a)𝑎(a) and (b)𝑏(b), dropping the two bias terms (c)𝑐(c) and (d)𝑑(d). Moreover, Shaw et al. (2018) merge the multiplication 𝐖k​𝐑subscript𝐖𝑘𝐑{\mathbf{W}}_{k}{\mathbf{R}} into a single trainable matrix 𝐑^^𝐑\hat{{\mathbf{R}}}, which abandons the inductive bias built into the original sinusoid positional encoding (Vaswani et al., 2017). In contrast, our relative positional embedding 𝐑𝐑{\mathbf{R}} adapts the sinusoid formulation. As a benefit of the inductive bias, a model trained on a memory of some certain length can automatically generalize to a memory several times longer during evaluation.
items.zh: 相比之下，Shaw等人（2018）的公式只有项(a)和(b)，丢弃了两个偏置项(c)和(d)。此外，Shaw等人（2018）将乘法𝐖_k𝐑合并为一个可训练矩阵𝐑̂，这放弃了原始正弦位置编码（Vaswani等人，2017）中内置的归纳偏置。相反，我们的相对位置嵌入𝐑采用了正弦公式。由于归纳偏置的优势，在某种长度记忆上训练的模型可以在评估时自动泛化到数倍长的记忆。

items.en: Equipping the recurrence mechanism with our proposed relative positional embedding, we finally arrive at the Transformer-XL architecture. For completeness, we summarize the computational procedure for a N𝑁N-layer Transformer-XL with a single attention head here. For n=1,…,N𝑛1…𝑁n=1,\dots,N:
items.zh: 将循环机制与我们提出的相对位置嵌入相结合，我们最终得到了Transformer-XL架构。为完整起见，我们在此总结具有单个注意力头的N层Transformer-XL的计算过程。对于n=1,…,N：

items.en: with 𝐡τ0≔𝐄𝐬τ≔superscriptsubscript𝐡𝜏0subscript𝐄subscript𝐬𝜏{\mathbf{h}}_{\tau}^{0}\coloneqq{\mathbf{E}}_{{\mathbf{s}}_{\tau}} defined as the word embedding sequence. In addition, it is worth mentioning that a naive way to compute 𝐀𝐀{\mathbf{A}} requires computing 𝐖k,Rn​𝐑i−jsuperscriptsubscript𝐖𝑘𝑅𝑛subscript𝐑𝑖𝑗{\mathbf{W}}_{k,R}^{n}{\mathbf{R}}_{i-j} for all pairs (i,j)𝑖𝑗(i,j), whose cost is quadratic w.r.t. the sequence length. However, noticing that the value of i−j𝑖𝑗i-j only ranges from zero to the sequence length, we show a simple computation procedure in Appendix B, which reduces the cost to be linear w.r.t. the sequence length.
items.zh: 其中𝐡_τ^0≔𝐄_{𝐬_τ}定义为词嵌入序列。此外，值得一提的是，计算𝐀的朴素方法需要计算所有对(i,j)的𝐖_{k,R}^n𝐑_{i-j}，其成本与序列长度成二次方关系。然而，注意到i−j的值仅从0到序列长度，我们在附录B中展示了一个简单的计算过程，将成本降低为与序列长度成线性关系。

items.en: We apply Transformer-XL to a variety of datasets on both word-level and character-level language modeling to have a comparison with state-of-the-art systems, including WikiText-103 (Merity et al., 2016), enwik8 (LLC, 2009), text8 (LLC, 2009), One Billion Word (Chelba et al., 2013), and Penn Treebank (Mikolov and Zweig, 2012).
items.zh: 我们将Transformer-XL应用于多种数据集，包括词级和字符级语言建模，与最先进的系统进行比较，包括WikiText-103（Merity等人，2016）、enwik8（LLC，2009）、text8（LLC，2009）、One Billion Word（Chelba等人，2013）和Penn Treebank（Mikolov和Zweig，2012）。

items.en: WikiText-103 is the largest available word-level language modeling benchmark with long-term dependency. It contains 103M training tokens from 28K articles, with an average length of 3.6K tokens per article, which allows testing the ability of long-term dependency modeling. We set the attention length to 384 during training and 1600 during evaluation. We adopted adaptive softmax and input representations (Baevski and Auli, 2018; Grave et al., 2016a). As shown in Table 1, Transformer-XL reduces the previous state-of-the-art (SoTA) perplexity from 20.5 to 18.3, which demonstrates the superiority of the Transformer-XL architecture.
items.zh: WikiText-103是最大的可用词级语言建模基准，具有长期依赖性。它包含来自28K篇文章的103M训练词元，平均每篇文章3.6K词元，这允许测试长期依赖建模的能力。我们在训练时将注意力长度设置为384，评估时设置为1600。我们采用了自适应softmax和输入表示（Baevski和Auli，2018；Grave等人，2016a）。如表1所示，Transformer-XL将先前最先进的困惑度从20.5降低到18.3，这证明了Transformer-XL架构的优越性。

items.en: The dataset enwik8 contains 100M bytes of unprocessed Wikipedia text. We compare our architecture with the previous results in Table 2. Under the model size constraint, the 12-layer Transformer-XL achieves a new SoTA result, outperforming the 12-layer vanilla Transformer from Al-Rfou et al. (2018) by 0.05, while both Transformer variants have a large margin over conventional RNN-based models. Notably, our 12-layer architecture achieves the same result as the 64-layer network from Al-Rfou et al. (2018), using only 17% of the parameter budget. In order to see whether better performances can be obtained by increasing the model size, we train 18-layer and 24-layer Transformer-XLs with increased model sizes. With the attention length 784 during training and 3,800 during evaluation, we obtained a new SoTA result and our method is the first to break through 1.0 on widely-studied character-level benchmarks. Different from Al-Rfou et al. (2018), Transformer-XL does not need any auxiliary losses, and thus all benefits are credited to a better architecture.
items.zh: 数据集enwik8包含100M字节的未处理维基百科文本。我们在表2中将我们的架构与先前结果进行比较。在模型大小约束下，12层Transformer-XL实现了新的最先进结果，优于Al-Rfou等人（2018）的12层普通Transformer 0.05，而两种Transformer变体均比传统的基于RNN的模型有较大优势。值得注意的是，我们的12层架构达到了与Al-Rfou等人（2018）的64层网络相同的结果，仅使用了17%的参数预算。为了观察增加模型大小是否能获得更好的性能，我们训练了18层和24层的Transformer-XL，并增加了模型大小。在训练时注意力长度为784、评估时长度为3800的情况下，我们获得了新的最先进结果，并且我们的方法是第一个在广泛研究的字符级基准上突破1.0的方法。与Al-Rfou等人（2018）不同，Transformer-XL不需要任何辅助损失，因此所有优势都归功于更好的架构。

items.en: Similar to but different from enwik8, text8 contains 100M processed Wikipedia characters created by lowering case the text and removing any character other than the 26 letters a through z, and space. Due to the similarity, we simply adapt the best model and the same hyper-parameters on enwik8 to text8 without further tuning. The comparison with previous methods is summarized in Table 3. Again, Transformer-XL achieves the new SoTA result with a clear margin.
items.zh: 与enwik8相似但不同，text8包含100M个处理过的维基百科字符，通过将文本小写并删除除26个字母a到z和空格以外的任何字符创建。由于相似性，我们简单地将enwik8上的最佳模型和相同超参数应用于text8，无需进一步调整。与先前方法的比较总结在表3中。再次，Transformer-XL以明显优势实现了新的最先进结果。

items.en: One Billion Word does not preserve any long-term dependency because sentences have been shuffled. Consequently, this dataset mainly tests the ability of modeling only short-term dependency. The comparison between Transformer-XL and the other methods is shown in Table 4. Although Transformer-XL is mainly designed to better capture longer-term dependency, it dramatically improves the single-model SoTA from 23.7 to 21.8. Specifically, Transformer-XL significantly outperforms a contemporary method using vanilla Transformers Baevski and Auli (2018), suggesting the advantage of Transformer-XL is generalizable to modeling short sequences.
items.zh: One Billion Word不保留任何长期依赖性，因为句子已被打乱。因此，该数据集主要测试仅建模短期依赖性的能力。Transformer-XL与其他方法的比较如表4所示。尽管Transformer-XL主要设计用于更好地捕获长期依赖性，但它将单模型最先进结果从23.7显著提高到21.8。具体来说，Transformer-XL显著优于使用普通Transformer的同期方法（Baevski和Auli，2018），表明Transformer-XL的优势可泛化到短序列建模。

items.en: We also report the results on word-level Penn Treebank in Table 5. Similar to AWD-LSTM (Merity et al., 2017), we apply variational dropout and weight average to Transformer-XL. With proper regularization, Transformer-XL achieves a new SoTA result among models without two-step finetuning. Penn Treebank has only 1M training tokens, which implies that Transformer-XL also generalizes well even on small datasets.
items.zh: 我们还在表5中报告了词级Penn Treebank的结果。与AWD-LSTM（Merity等人，2017）类似，我们将变分dropout和权重平均应用于Transformer-XL。通过适当的正则化，Transformer-XL在没有两步微调的模型中实现了新的最先进结果。Penn Treebank只有1M训练词元，这表明Transformer-XL即使在小数据集上也具有良好的泛化能力。

items.en: We conduct two sets of ablation studies to examine the effects of two proposed techniques used in Transformer-XL: the recurrence mechanism and the new positional encoding scheme.
items.zh: 我们进行了两组消融研究，以检验Transformer-XL中使用的两种提出技术的影响：循环机制和新的位置编码方案。

items.en: The first study is performed on WikiText-103, which requires modeling long-term dependency. The results are reported in Table 6. Among the compared encoding schemes, Shaw et al. (2018) is relative, while Vaswani et al. (2017) and Al-Rfou et al. (2018) are absolute. “Full” and “half” losses refer to applying a cross entropy loss to all or the recent half positions in the segment. We found that absolute encodings only work well with half losses because half losses exclude positions with very short attention lengths during training for better generalization. Table 6 shows that both the recurrence mechanism and our encoding scheme are necessary to achieve the best performance, as well as generalizing to longer attention sequences during evaluation time. Although the backpropagation length during training is only 128, with the two techniques the attention length can be increased to 640 at test time. In the standard setting with 151M parameters, the perplexity decreases as the attention length increases.
items.zh: 第一项研究在需要建模长期依赖性的WikiText-103上进行。结果报告在表6中。在比较的编码方案中，Shaw等人（2018）是相对的，而Vaswani等人（2017）和Al-Rfou等人（2018）是绝对的。“全”损失和“半”损失是指将交叉熵损失应用于片段中所有位置或最近一半位置。我们发现绝对编码仅在半损失下工作良好，因为半损失在训练期间排除了注意力长度非常短的位置，以获得更好的泛化。表6显示，循环机制和我们的编码方案对于实现最佳性能以及在评估时泛化到更长的注意力序列都是必要的。尽管训练期间的反向传播长度仅为128，但借助这两种技术，测试时的注意力长度可以增加到640。在标准设置下，参数为151M，困惑度随着注意力长度的增加而降低。

items.en: Since the recurrence mechanism costs additional memory, we also compare Transformer-XL with baselines under the same GPU memory constraints. As shown in Table 10 in Appendix A, despite using a shorter backpropagation length, Transformer-XL remains superior to the baselines.
items.zh: 由于循环机制会额外消耗内存，我们还在相同GPU内存限制下将Transformer-XL与基线模型进行了比较。如附录A中表10所示，尽管使用了更短的反向传播长度，Transformer-XL仍然优于基线模型。

items.en: The second study targets at isolating the effects of resolving the context fragmentation problem from the benefit of capturing longer context length. In order to achieve this goal, we deliberately choose a dataset that does not require long-term dependency, so that any improvement from establishing the recurrence can be attributed to solving the context fragmentation. Specifically, we perform this controlled experiment on the One Billion Word dataset, which can only benefit from removing the context fragmentation. We train a 20-layer Transformer-XL with ∼similar-to\sim0.3B parameters for 400K steps. As shown in Table 7, using segment-level recurrence substantially improves performance even when long-term dependency is not needed, which is consistent with our previous discussion that the recurrence mechanism resolves the context fragmentation problem. Moreover, our relative positional encodings is also superior to Shaw et al. (2018) on short sequences.
items.zh: 第二项研究旨在将解决上下文碎片化问题的影响与捕捉更长上下文长度的好处分离开来。为此，我们特意选择了一个不需要长期依赖的数据集，这样通过建立循环机制带来的任何改进都可以归因于解决了上下文碎片化问题。具体来说，我们在One Billion Word数据集上进行了这项受控实验，该数据集只能从消除上下文碎片化中受益。我们训练了一个20层、约0.3B参数的Transformer-XL，共400K步。如表7所示，即使不需要长期依赖，使用段级循环也显著提升了性能，这与我们之前的讨论一致，即循环机制解决了上下文碎片化问题。此外，我们的相对位置编码在短序列上也优于Shaw等人（2018）的方法。

items.en: Khandelwal et al. (2018) proposed a method to evaluate the Effective Context Length (ECL) of a sequence model. ECL is the longest length to which increasing the context span would lead to a gain more than a threshold. However, ECL ignores the fact that it is harder to get improvement when a model already achieves a lower perplexity using only a shorter context, and thus it is not suitable for fair comparison among multiple models. We instead propose a new metric called Relative Effective Context Length (RECL). RECL is defined on a model group instead of a single model, and the gain of a long context is measure by the relative improvement over the best short context model. As such, the model group shares the same baseline to enable fair comparison. RECL also has a parameter r𝑟r, which means constraining the comparison on top-r𝑟r hard examples. See Appedix C for more details about RECL. As shown in Table 8, Transformer-XL manages to model dependency of 900 words long on average with r=0.1𝑟0.1r=0.1. The RECL of Transformer-XL is 80% and 450% longer than recurrent networks and Transformer respectively. Both the recurrence mechanism and our positional encodings contribute to a longer RECL. This further substantiates our argument that Transformer-XL is able to model longer-term dependency.
items.zh: Khandelwal等人（2018）提出了一种评估序列模型有效上下文长度（ECL）的方法。ECL是指增加上下文跨度能带来超过阈值增益的最长长度。然而，ECL忽略了这样一个事实：当模型仅使用较短上下文就已获得较低困惑度时，进一步改进更加困难，因此它不适合在多个模型之间进行公平比较。我们提出了一种新的度量标准，称为相对有效上下文长度（RECL）。RECL定义在一个模型组上，而不是单个模型上，长上下文的增益通过相对于最佳短上下文模型的相对改进来衡量。这样，模型组共享相同的基线，从而实现公平比较。RECL还有一个参数r，表示将比较限制在top-r困难样本上。关于RECL的更多细节，请参见附录C。如表8所示，当r=0.1时，Transformer-XL平均能够建模900个词长的依赖关系。Transformer-XL的RECL比循环网络和Transformer分别长80%和450%。循环机制和我们的位置编码都有助于更长的RECL。这进一步证实了我们的论点，即Transformer-XL能够建模更长期的依赖关系。

items.en: Trained only on WikiText-103 which is medium-sized, Transformer-XL is already able to generate relatively coherent articles with thousands of tokens without manual cherry picking, despite minor flaws. Please refer to Appendix E for samples.
items.zh: 仅在中等规模的WikiText-103上训练，Transformer-XL已经能够生成相对连贯的、包含数千个token的文章，且无需手动挑选，尽管存在一些小缺陷。样本请参见附录E。

items.en: Finally, we compare the evaluation speed of our model with the vanilla Transformer model Al-Rfou et al. (2018). As shown in Table 9, due to the state reuse scheme, Transformer-XL achieves an up to 1,874 times speedup during evaluation.
items.zh: 最后，我们将模型的评估速度与vanilla Transformer模型Al-Rfou等人（2018）进行了比较。如表9所示，由于状态复用机制，Transformer-XL在评估期间实现了高达1874倍的加速。

items.en: Transformer-XL obtains strong perplexity results, models longer-term dependency than RNNs and Transformer, achieves substantial speedup during evaluation, and is able to generate coherent text articles. We envision interesting applications of Transformer-XL in the fields of text generation, unsupervised feature learning, image and speech modeling.
items.zh: Transformer-XL获得了强大的困惑度结果，建模了比RNN和Transformer更长期的依赖关系，在评估期间实现了显著加速，并且能够生成连贯的文本文章。我们预见到Transformer-XL在文本生成、无监督特征学习、图像和语音建模等领域的有趣应用。

items.en: ZD and YY were supported in part by National Science Foundation (NSF) under the grant IIS-1546329 and by the DOE-Office of Science under the grant ASCR #KJ040201. ZY and RS were supported in part by the Office of Naval Research grant N000141812861, the NSF grant IIS1763562, the Nvidia fellowship, and the Siebel scholarship.
items.zh: ZD和YY部分得到了国家科学基金会（NSF）资助（编号IIS-1546329）以及能源部科学办公室资助（编号ASCR #KJ040201）的支持。ZY和RS部分得到了海军研究办公室资助（编号N000141812861）、NSF资助（编号IIS1763562）、Nvidia奖学金以及Siebel奖学金的支持。
